subcodes.first_line: O steadfast Nabíl, the letter addressed to the Afnán was read, and your faithfulness to the friends brought joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت نامه بجناب افنان قرائت گردید و از وفای شما بیاران فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @naming of children; of individuals, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
